# Base requirements (install these FIRST)
# These must be installed before torch-scatter
# 
# Installation:
#   macOS: pip3 install -r requirements-base.txt
#   Linux/Colab: pip install -r requirements-base.txt

# Deep learning - MUST install torch first
# Note: PyTorch 2.3.0-2.4.0 have good PyG wheel support for macOS ARM64
# If you need a newer version, you may need to build torch-scatter from source
torch>=2.0.0,<2.9.0

# Core dependencies
numpy>=1.21.0
pandas>=1.3.0
scikit-learn>=1.0.0
matplotlib>=3.4.0
seaborn>=0.11.0

# Jupyter basics
jupyter>=1.0.0
ipykernel>=6.0.0
